calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Petitioner: Yue Hua Shen, present in pro per as Guardia Ad Litem for the Minor: Hui Tin Shen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Charles Zhang.
No appearance by the Co-Petitioner/Minor's Mother: Xu Lin Yao, but signed the petition consenting to the name change of a minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Annie Shen.
Decree signed in open court.
